name: Stir Fried Broccoli and Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a 12-inch skillet with cooking spray; heat until hot.
2. Add ginger and garlic; stir fry about 1 minute or until light brown.
3. Add broccoli, carrots, and onion; stir fry for 1 minute.
4. Stir in broth and salt; mix into the vegetable mixture.
5. Cook and stir for 10 seconds or until thickened.
6. Add water and mushrooms; cook and stir for 30 seconds.
